name: *sobs quietly*
description:
Baby I'm sorry, things didn't work out the way that I planned, I'm sad that I lost you, but I won't chase you

I still don't blame you for making me stall, when I learnt how to drive a car, because your best friends were too sad to take you to the airport

sorry for not uploading was taking a massive shit

muchas gracias Star Venerable for the lorebooks, saves me a headache

vote here!
creator: freakfefsissocool
